_note: Send an audio clip via URL. The URL must be publicly accessible at send time. Recommended format: MP3. Max file size: 25 MB. Set 'is_reusable: true' to receive an attachment_id for reuse across conversations (avoids re-uploading the same clip). When uploading via the Attachment Upload API, set Content-Type header to the audio MIME type (e.g. audio/mp3) — this differs from image/video uploads.
